_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Develop and deploy software using continuous integration methods, processes, and tools, including test case writing against completion criteria (for each release, capability, micro-service, or component), build automation, and build processes.
reference_document_element_description: Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build automation, test execution, artifact management, deployment workflows, and pipeline failure triage.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI TF domain. TF-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-009 (TF, cosine: 0.548), AI-S-016 (AI, cosine: 0.543).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.6/10 (raw 0.659). Shared vocabulary: [automation, build, test]. DCWF-only terms [against, capability, case, completion, component, continuous] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, artifact, cd, ci, configure, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.869, R=0.878). Balanced P/R — the 30-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Develop and deploy software using continuous integration methods, processes, and" and "Configure and maintain CI/CD pipelines for data and AI projects, including build" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.550 < STS 0.659 (gap -0.109). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [against, capability, case] and [ai, artifact, cd] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 14.0%. Shared tokens: [automation, build, test]. DCWF-only: [against, capability, case, completion, component, continuous]. WIDAI-only: [ai, artifact, cd, ci, configure, data].
